chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constt:Petition No.S-288 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 01. For orders on M.A.No.609/2024 (U/ A). 02. For orders on office objection. 03. For orders on M.A.No.610/2024 (E/ A). 04. For the hearing of the main case. 01.08.2024. Mr. Asad Ali Khakhrani Abro, Advocate for the petitioners. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Over-ruled. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. By this petition, it is stated by the petitioners that they have married of their own accord, therefore, they are going to be involved in a false case by their relatives. By stating so, they have sought protection from such harassment. No cogent ground is advanced by the petitioners for approaching this Court directly, without exhausting the remedy which was available to them before the learned Sessions Judge/Ex-officio Justice of Peace, concerned. Consequently, the instant petition is converted into application u/s.22-A/B Cr.PC with direction to the office to transmit the same to the learned Sessions Judge/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Dadu, for its disposal, per law. JUDGE
